ci_commands_found.purpose: Generate class files for the module
Verify Gradle configuration has no errors

p2p_tests_added: test_p2p_frontend_common_compiles - Verifies the modified module compiles (~11 min)
test_p2p_frontend_common_classes_exist - Verifies class files are produced (~11 min)
test_p2p_no_gradle_configuration_errors - Verifies Gradle config is valid (~5 min)
test_p2p_gradlew_available - Quick sanity check that gradlew exists
ci_discovery_notes: Repository uses Gradle with many convention plugins
Build requires Java 17 and downloads dependencies from Maven
Compilation takes ~11 minutes due to dependency resolution and build setup
No GitHub Actions workflows present in repo at base commit
The modified module (compiler:frontend.common) is a JVM Kotlin module
Tests use 900s timeout to accommodate the long build time
